stem:
The Alaska Native Language Archive (ANLA) is known for its impressive audio collection. _______ the ANLA has more than 5,000 audio recordings of Native Alaskan languages dating as far back as 1943.

Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
explanation: The second sentence backs up the first by giving the impressive figure of 5,000-plus recordings, so “In fact” fits as an emphasis marker. “After,” “Regardless,” and “Instead” wrongly signal sequence, concession, or contrast.
